_doc: Metis AIPU on-chip SRAM spec (Phase 1.2). CACTI tier, NOT Ramulator2. Quad-core: L1 4 MiB/core + L2 32 MiB shared + D-IMC 1 MiB/core = 52 MiB total. NO published BW/latency -> CACTI/assumption (m1_cim_spm derives/uses these). RESIDENCY = architecture-only: 8B INT8 weights (~8 GB) >> 32 MiB L2, so weights NEVER reside in SRAM (the decode memory wall is host LPDDR, not SRAM); SRAM holds activation/KV tiles only.

notes.residency: 8B weights (~8 GB INT8) >> 32 MiB -> weights never resident; SRAM = activations/KV tiles only; decode wall is host LPDDR.
notes.bw_latency: no published Metis SRAM BW/latency; latency_ns/bw_GBs are CACTI-tier representative defaults (assumption); m1_cim_spm may refine.
